title: self sabotage Pack
description: A light mashup / edited texturepack with short swords and armor
body:
This ist just a very simple Vanilla like Textuepack for Minecraft Java.
It overhauls a few of the relevant pvp Items such as swords, armor, bow, tools, gui etc.

The general appeal is very simplistic and tires to tie it to the base game. With the main diffrence being the "colour coded" tools so it looks more diffrent between tiers and a bit more uniform in itself.
